title: Echelon Taste: AI-Curated Private Dining Experiences
description: A luxury dining service using AI to curate hyper-personalized culinary experiences based on psychological profiles.
goal: Increase bookings for exclusive dining experiences through curiosity-driven campaigns.
offer: Private chef experiences tailored to your personality, mood, and subconscious preferences using proprietary AI profiling.
misconception: Fine dining is about food quality, not realizing the experience is what truly defines luxury.
targetAudience: Wealthy socialites and professionals who value exclusivity, personalization, and experiential luxury.
